name: Kalyanam Dum Dum Dum
overview: When a middle-aged village man marries a young, modern city girl, their worlds collide in the most hilarious way. What follows is a heartwarming mix of confusion, comedy, and culture clash as love finds its rhythm between two generations and two very different families.

trailers.title: Kalyanam Dum Dum Dum Teaser | Sidhu | Deepika Damu | Pradeep Saravanan | Priyadharshini Rajkumar
